title: CONSUMER RIGHTS RESOURCES - 211info
text: OREGON CONSUMER JUSTICE CONSUMER RIGHTS RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides tools and information to assist in exercising consumer rights. Resources include handouts, articles, videos, research, and comic books to support consumers in taking action against unlawful practices and holding companies accountable. Also provides connection to legal experts (e.g., direct representation, advice) for those facing consumer-related law issues. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 406-3311 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 406-3311 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Legal Counseling Legal Information Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
